channel.title: gardening on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in gardening on Nature Works

item.title: Biodiverse
item.description:
Just a couple of quick links, UK & global ecology references

For a long time, I’ve been singing the praises of the Database of Insects and their Food Plants. http://localhost:1313/blog/230209-biodiverse/

item.title: Robin Harford’s Eatweeds podcast
item.description:
His podcast is rather good

I actually managed to get some gardening done after days of writing and filming. http://localhost:1313/blog/230111-eatweeds/
